device_name: SpotLight / SpotLight Duo with Low Dose Lung Cancer Screening Option
intended_use: The SpotLight / SpotLight Duo is intended to produce cross-sectional images of the body by computer reconstruction of X-ray transmission projection data taken at different angles. The system has the c
intended_use_full: The SpotLight / SpotLight Duo is intended to produce cross-sectional images of the body by computer reconstruction of X-ray transmission projection data taken at different angles. The system has the capability to image cardiovascular and thoracic anatomies, including the heart, in a single rotation. The Low Dose CT Lung Cancer Screening Option for SpotLight / SpotLight Duo is indicated for using low dose CT for lung cancer screening.
target_condition: Lung cancer (via nodule detection in screening)
ground_truth: Clinical radiologist evaluation (two U.S. board-certified radiologists); pathology detection capability for lung cancer screening findings
other_metrics: All 10 small patient cases (50-70 kg, <2.8 mGy) were evaluated as diagnostic for the indications for use; readers reported detection of various pathologies including very small nodules (2 mm)
